programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: From an Arizona joint's chicken fried steak smothered in gravy to sweet, fluffy doughnuts in Rhode Island, getting in line to find dishes that diners don't mind waiting hours to sink their teeth into.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Out of the Military and Into Paradise
programs.desc: A couple who recently retired from the military want to finally settle down with their two teen sons in Key West, Fla.; she wants to spend more for move-in ready, but he wants to keep the price low and renovate to create future equity.
